'''Gauch''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] on [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], at the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]; he worked for [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. When the Vong [[Battle of Dubrillion|attacked]] the planet at the start of the war, he was one of the pilots in the rag-tag [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] fleet who defended the world. He piloted the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bomber]] ''[[TB-1]]''. He was killed in the battle when the [[Belt-Runner I|''Belt Runner I'''s]] shield failed, and he took enemy fire.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
